hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); for p in '.env' 'pnpm-lock.yaml' 'generated/client'; do [[ "$FILE" == *"$p"* ]] && echo "Blocked: $FILE is protected" >&2 && exit 2; done; exit 0
FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.tsx ]] && cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/src" && npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; exit 0
cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && echo 'Branch:' && git branch --show-current && echo 'Recent commits:' && git log --oneline -5 && echo 'Modified files:' && git status --short
